item.title:
paddypower: Paddy Power @paddypower · 34min "What if the real quadruple is Arsenal finishing second four times?"
Arsenal lost to Bo
item.description:
Paddy Power @paddypower · 34min "What if the real quadruple is Arsenal finishing second four times?"
Arsenal lost to Bournemouth and we saw some incredible headloss from everyone involved...
It's... Fan Denial.
18+ GambleAware 3 17 111 12 mil
